text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-off, energy resilient, tech sold, smalls edged large. OpenAI-linked stocks faltered per Yahoo, dragging Nasdaq amid heavy earnings week start; energy held via oil at $100+ from Middle East shocks, small caps eked +0.02pp outperformance despite vol contraction signaling low conviction. Rotation to defensives continues on hawkish CPI 3.32% YoY.

INDICES — VIX 17.8 down vs ma20 20.3. SPY +0.17%, QQQ +0.05%, IJR +0.19%, DIA -0.08%. Small > large by 0.02pp. Oil USO +1.75% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated: UNG 2.3x, UTES 1.6x industries; XLRE 1.0x, XLV 0.9x sectors. Declining: SPY 0.5x, QQQ implied low via indices avg 0.59x, DIA 0.4x. Vol down + price up = low-conviction rally across SPY/QQQ.

SECTORS — XLE Energy +1.66%, XLRE Real Estate +0.97%, XLP Staples +0.90%, XLV Healthcare +0.26%, XLF Financials +0.08%, XLU Utilities +0.02%, XLC Comms -0.05%, XLY Discretionary -0.70%, XLB Materials -0.73%, XLI Industrials -0.89%, XLK Technology -1.69%. Top industries MSOS +10.04%, USO +1.75%; bottom SMH -2.97%, WGMI -5.06%.

THE 7s — Top5: New Metals 7 +1.86% (strongest ? weakest ?), Bank 7 +0.99%, Energy 7 +0.92%, Mag 7 +0.65%, Insurance 7 +0.64%. Bot5: Fab 7 -1.79%, Old Metals 7 -2.81% (strongest ? weakest ?).

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Stance Hawk 6 (Cook et al), Neutral 5 (Powell et al), Dove 4 (Bowman et al). USD stress 63/100 Elevated, CP-Tbill 97th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.13 elevated protection demand, skew +5.5% put premium fear. VIX 17.8 below ma20 20.3 complacency. ATM_IV 18.4%.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil USO +1.75% buoyed XLE +1.66% amid Strait tensions, gold GLD -0.78% despite risk-off unusual. Tech XLK -1.69% transmitted to semis SMH -2.97%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 56 Neutral. Top movers MSOS +10.04% industries, USO +1.75% cross-asset, KRE +1.71% industries. 20d mom best XLK +23.80% sector, Semi 7 +51.11% basket; worst XLE -6.86% sector, Energy 7 -5.55% basket. Vol spikes QCOM 3.9x +0.95% Semi 7 accumulation, UPS 2.6x -3.97% Freight distribution.

WATCH — QCOM +0.95% vol 3.9x spike. MSOS +10.04% industry lead. XLK -1.69% OpenAI falter divergence.
